backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the school admission system defining data types (Student, AdmissionForm, etc.) and including mixins for blob storage and authorization. Contains student registration, profile management, and application state logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the GuardianDeclarationSection component displays bilingual (English and Hindi) declaration text with a bilingual acknowledgement checkbox tracked in form state.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Inter School Kawakol Admission System' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (register, login, admin login, admission form, student dashboard, admin dashboard) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddressSection.t: Form card component for collecting address details (village, post office, police station, block, district, state, pin code) with a state dropdown limited to Bihar and Jharkhand.
frontend/src/components/BankDetailsSecti: Form card component for bank details with fields for account holder name, account number, IFSC code, and a bank name dropdown listing several Indian banks.
frontend/src/components/Class10SubjectSe: React component for Class 10 subject selection, allowing students to choose MIL, SIL, compulsory (checkbox), and one extra subject (radio) from predefined lists.
frontend/src/components/Class11And12Subj: React component for Class 11/12 subject selection, supporting stream selection (Science/Commerce/Arts) with corresponding subject checkboxes and an extra subject option.
frontend/src/components/Class9SubjectSel: React component for Class 9 subject selection, identical in structure to the Class 10 component with MIL, SIL, compulsory, and extra subject categories.
frontend/src/components/ContactDetailsSe: Form section component for collecting parent/guardian details including names, occupations, contact numbers, and Aadhaar-linked names for both father and mother.
frontend/src/components/GuardianDeclarat: Displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) school declaration and a checkbox for the guardian to acknowledge and agree to the terms before form submission.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping the app with a ThemeProvider, SchoolHeader, footer with copyright info, and a Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/PersonalDetailsS: A form section component for collecting student personal details including name, gender, category, and photo upload (JPG/PNG, max 5MB) with preview and validation.
frontend/src/components/PreviousExamSect: A form section component for entering previous exam details such as exam passed, roll number, school name, passing year, marks obtained, and division.
frontend/src/components/PrintableAdmissi: A component that renders a formatted, printable admission form for a student, including school header, photo, and all form fields with human-readable label mappings.
frontend/src/components/SchoolHeader.tsx: A simple header component displaying the school logo, name, and location for the Inter School Kawakol admission portal.
frontend/src/components/StudentIdentifie: A form section component for capturing student identifiers (PEN, APPAR, E-Shikshakosh number) and contact info (phone, email) with inline field-level validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including student registration, login, form draft saving, form submission, and admin application management (approve/reject/list).
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all student applications in a table with approve/reject actions, status badges, and an Excel export feature, guarded by sessionStorage authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with hardcoded credentials that sets a sessionStorage flag on success and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionFormPage.tsx: Multi-section admission form page that loads existing student form data, supports saving drafts and submitting, and disables editing once the application is pending, approved, or rejected.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Student login page that authenticates via email/password and redirects to the admission form or dashboard based on the student's current application status.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Student registration page with a form collecting class, name, email, and password fields, including client-side validation and error handling before calling the register mutation and redirecting to login.
frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx: Student dashboard page that displays the logged-in student's application status (pending/approved/rejected) with a status badge and message, and renders a printable admission form if available.
frontend/src/styles/print.css: Print-specific CSS that hides navigation/buttons, sets A4 page size with margins, and ensures images and student photos render correctly when printing.
frontend/src/utils/errorHandling.ts: Utility that classifies IC canister errors (IC0508, reject code 5, network failures) and returns user-friendly messages instead of raw error strings.
frontend/src/utils/exportToExcel.ts: Utility that converts an array of Student objects into a CSV file with comprehensive headers covering personal, academic, address, and subject fields, then triggers a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, font families, box shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3 for a school admission form, documenting existing features and new feature requests including a GuardianDeclarationSection with English/Hindi declaration text and a checkbox integrated into the form state.
